closed_capability.summary: G2.188 replaced stop-loss route-body service resolver calls with FastAPI provider-injected service parameters while preserving route paths, HTTP methods, response models, OpenAPI examples, direct-test fallback behavior, and src-level service getters.
closed_capability.retention_reason: These src-level getters remain provider backing functions and are not deletion candidates in this closeout package.
